display.purpose: Hero headline and the single biggest statements only. Clash Display 600, tight tracking.

headline.purpose: Section openers. The largest reach per scroll beat.

lede.purpose: The paragraph under a headline that states the section's argument.

body.purpose: Running copy: town histories, the persuasive close. Measure capped 65-75ch.

label.purpose: Eyebrows and small metadata. Track-spaced uppercase, used sparingly.

shadows.name: photo-float
shadows.value: backdrop-filter: blur(12px); background: color-mix(in oklab, var(--color-ink) 30%, transparent)
shadows.purpose: The only elevation token. Glass capsules over imagery (nav, spot chips). Never on the flat light page.

motion.name: ease-out-quint
motion.purpose: Default reveal and transition easing. Calm exponential ease-out, no bounce.

motion.name: ease-out-expo
motion.purpose: Larger hero-moment reveals (the map assembling, big headline entrances).

motion.name: duration-state
motion.purpose: Hover and interactive state-change duration (color only).

motion.name: stagger-step
motion.purpose: Delay between staggered children (headline then lede then chips).

components.name: Primary Button (over photo)
components.description: Hero CTA. Solid sand pill on the photo, washes to terracotta on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: var(--color-sand); color: var(--color-ink); border: none; border-radius: 9999px; padding: 0.375rem 1.25rem; font-family: var(--font-body); font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 200ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1), color 200ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: var(--color-terracotta); color: var(--color-sand); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--color-sea); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Primary Button (on light)
components.description: Light-section CTA. Sea-green pill on sand, ~8.7:1 contrast. Washes to sea-deep on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-onlight { background: var(--color-sea); color: var(--color-sand); border: none; border-radius: 9999px; padding: 0.625rem 1.5rem; font-family: var(--font-body); font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 200ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); } .ds-btn-onlight:hover { background: var(--color-sea-deep); } .ds-btn-onlight:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--color-sea); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Spot Capsule (over photo)
components.description: Translucent glass capsule over the hero photo. Backdrop blur, sand text.
components.css: .ds-chip-glass { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; border-radius: 9999px; border: 1px solid color-mix(in oklab, var(--color-sand) 25%, transparent); background: color-mix(in oklab, var(--color-ink) 20%, transparent); padding: 0.5rem 1rem; font-family: var(--font-body); font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: color-mix(in oklab, var(--color-sand) 90%, transparent); text-decoration: none; backdrop-filter: blur(12px); transition: background-color 200ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1), border-color 200ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); } .ds-chip-glass:hover { border-color: color-mix(in oklab, var(--color-sand) 40%, transparent); background: color-mix(in oklab, var(--color-sand) 15%, transparent); color: var(--color-sand); }

components.name: Spot Capsule (on light)
components.description: Solid chip for light sections. Sand-deep fill, ink text, no border at rest.
components.css: .ds-chip-light { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; border-radius: 9999px; background: var(--color-sand-deep); color: var(--color-ink); padding: 0.5rem 1rem; font-family: var(--font-body); font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; text-decoration: none; transition: background-color 200ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1), box-shadow 200ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); } .ds-chip-light:hover { box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px color-mix(in oklab, var(--color-ink) 15%, transparent); }

components.name: Floating Nav Pill
components.description: Centered glass capsule navigation over the hero. Wordmark pill + links + CTA.
components.html:
elyu
GuideThe MapJournal
Plan a trip
components.css: .ds-nav { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 2rem; border-radius: 9999px; border: 1px solid color-mix(in oklab, var(--color-sand) 15%, transparent); background: color-mix(in oklab, var(--color-ink) 35%, transparent); padding: 0.5rem 0.625rem; backdrop-filter: blur(12px); font-family: var(--font-body); } .ds-nav-mark { background: var(--color-sand); color: var(--color-ink); border-radius: 9999px; padding: 0.375rem 1rem; font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 500; text-transform: lowercase; letter-spacing: -0.01em; text-decoration: none; } .ds-nav-links { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.75rem; } .ds-nav-links a { border-radius: 9999px; padding: 0.375rem 1.25rem; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: color-mix(in oklab, var(--color-sand) 85%, transparent); text-decoration: none; transition: background-color 200ms, color 200ms; } .ds-nav-links a:hover { background: color-mix(in oklab, var(--color-sand) 10%, transparent); color: var(--color-sand); } .ds-nav-cta { background: var(--color-sand); color: var(--color-ink); border-radius: 9999px; padding: 0.375rem 1.25rem; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; text-decoration: none; transition: background-color 200ms, color 200ms; } .ds-nav-cta:hover { background: var(--color-terracotta); color: var(--color-sand); }

narrative.overview: The entire site exists to overturn one sentence: 'La Union is overrated.' The design rewards a longer gaze the way the place rewards a longer visit. Nothing arrives all at once; meaning emerges on a second read, detail emerges on scroll, the argument lands on reflection. Warm coastal editorial, El Nino afternoon light on an off-white page, not the cream-and-gold luxury-travel template and not a SaaS landing page in a magazine costume. Color is restrained on light surfaces and committed when a section becomes its own world. Motion is choreographed but quiet: sections reveal as they enter the viewport, easing always exponential ease-out, never competing with the place for attention.
keyCharacteristics: Warm off-white (sand) as the default ground, never stark white.
Fluid display type with tight negative tracking; calm 1.65 body leading.
Restrained on light, committed in hero/feature moments (sea panels, drenched photos).
Terracotta as a <=10% accent, never body text.
Scroll-revealed, ease-out motion. The reveal is the concept.

rules.name: The One Spark Rule
rules.body: Terracotta appears on <=10% of any screen. Its rarity is the emphasis. The moment two terracotta things compete, neither reads as the accent.

rules.name: The Contrast Gate Rule
rules.body: Terracotta and ink-soft never carry small body text on sand (both below 4.5:1). Body copy is ink on sand, or sand on sea.

rules.name: The No Stark White Rule
rules.body: Never #fff and never #000. Every neutral is tinted warm toward the sand hue.

rules.name: The Weight Ladder Rule
rules.body: Only three weights ship: Geist 400 (body), 500 (UI/labels/nav), Clash 600 (display/headline).

rules.name: The Tight-Top Rule
rules.body: Display and headline run tight (lh <= 0.96, negative tracking). Body and lede run open (lh >= 1.55). The contrast is the editorial rhythm.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Light-page surfaces are flat. Separation is tonal (sand vs sand-deep vs sea), never a drop shadow. Glass + blur is reserved for over-photo elements.

dos: Do ground every page on warm sand (#F5F0E6); tint all neutrals toward the brand hue.
Do put body text as ink on sand or sand on sea; both clear AAA.
Do keep terracotta to <=10% of any screen, accents and large text only.
Do separate light-page surfaces tonally (sand / sand-deep / sea), flat, no shadows.
Do make every button and chip a full pill; it is a brand signal.
Do reveal sections on scroll with a small translate + fade, staggered, ease-out, no bounce.
Do ship real La Union imagery; this is a travel brief, zero images is a bug.
donts: Don't use #fff or #000 anywhere. Pure white on this page is a bug.
Don't put small body text in terracotta or ink-soft on sand (both below 4.5:1).
Don't reach for the cream-and-gold luxury-travel template or a serif-italic-drop-cap editorial-magazine costume.
Don't default to display serifs (Playfair / Cormorant / Fraunces). Type is Clash Display + Geist.
Don't build the page as identical icon-heading-text card grids or a centered icon-title-subtitle stack.
Don't turn the site into a 'Top 10 things to do' checklist.
Don't use border-left/border-right greater than 1px as a colored accent stripe.
Don't apply glassmorphism as a default. Glass + blur is for over-photo elements only.
Don't animate layout properties or use bounce/elastic easing. Transform and opacity only, ease-out.
